title: dieteria incana
intro: Dieteria incana, also known as gray goosepod or gray daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Dieteria incana include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable resource in natural remedies. Dieteria incana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
